Nonprofits qualify for discounted rates; alcohol service requires prior approval and event insurance is required.
listings.service_area: Felton and the San Lorenzo Valley

listings.name: Waterfall Lodge and Retreat

The lodge is built from reclaimed 19th-century barn wood and on-site milled lumber, with a sunny meadow for ceremonies and 32 cabins and cottages that sleep up to 86 guests overnight. It is a bring-your-own-vendor venue and hosts weddings (up to 150 daytime guests), corporate and group retreats, and gatherings.
listings.service_area: Ben Lomond and the San Lorenzo Valley

listings.name: The Barn at River House
listings.description: Rustic Ben Lomond wedding venue on a private San Lorenzo River property, centered on a 3,500-square-foot barn with custom lighting, a second-floor lounge, and a wrap-around catwalk. A wisteria-covered arbor leads to a wooden gazebo over the river, a redwood grove serves as a natural ceremony spot, and about 10,000 square feet of lawn seats up to 250 guests for dining. Available April through December; booking is by phone (Casey) with a bridal cottage and catering station included.
listings.service_area: Ben Lomond and the San Lorenzo Valley

listings.name: Highlands House
listings.description: Historic 1940s house available to rent for weddings, parties, and events at Highlands County Park on Highway 9 in Ben Lomond. Operated by Santa Cruz County Parks, the house has a grand room for dancing, a kitchen for food prep, a storage room stocked with tables and chairs, and two upstairs rooms for the wedding party, set on forested park grounds with riverside trails. Capacity is up to 200 guests April through October (100 November through March). Reservations are booked through Santa Cruz County Parks, not a private operator.
listings.service_area: Santa Cruz County (county-operated park venue)

The 20-acre property has two orchards, gardens, trails, and an open meadow. It hosts a limited number of weddings each year between May and October, up to 150 guests for full packages, plus intimate micro-weddings and elopements.
